response.justification: Experienced senior engineer with 15+ years and strong Google/Meta credentials, but severe misalignment with role-specific technical requirements. C++ expertise ended in 2014 (10+ years ago); recent career focused entirely on web/cloud technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Zero demonstrated background in industrial automation, manufacturing systems, IoT, or industrial security standards (IEC 62443, SDL) which form the core of this role. While general engineering maturity is strong, the combination of obsolete C++ skills, missing domain expertise, and absence of security specialization represent fundamental gaps unsuitable for hands-on development and architecture responsibilities.
strengths: 15+ years of software development with senior/staff positions at Google and Meta
Proven ability to mentor, teach, and establish engineering practices across organizations
Experience designing event-driven, distributed systems at scale
concerns: C++ programming skills are 10+ years outdated; entire recent career in web/cloud stack (TypeScript/Node.js)
No background in industrial automation, manufacturing machinery, IoT systems, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA, etc.)
Missing expertise in industrial security standards (IEC 62443), SDL practices, message brokers, MQTT, and multi-threaded/networked system design
